consumer_hint: Node v208 managed audit persistence boundary candidate
scope: structured real-read runtime smoke evidence, binary provenance hints, live-read session hints, failure taxonomy, taxonomy digest verification sample, operator-window identity-neutral proof, CI evidence path/no-restore hints, and artifact retention evidence for INFOJSON, STORAGEJSON, HEALTH, STATSJSON, and SMOKEJSON without executing LOAD, COMPACT, SETNXEX, restore, CI upload, or production window opening

expected: SMOKEJSON lists read commands and forbidden commands
SMOKEJSON exposes failure taxonomy categories and taxonomy_digest for imported window verification
SMOKEJSON exposes operator_window.identity_neutral_proof=true for archive handoff checks
SMOKEJSON and INFOJSON expose ci_evidence.artifact_path_hint=c/80/ and no_restore_proof=true
SMOKEJSON and INFOJSON expose artifact_retention.retention_days=30 and github_artifact_upload_attempted=false
SMOKEJSON live_read_session.server_uptime_bucket is present for real-read execution packet checks
INFOJSON returns runtime_identity evidence with artifact retention path hint
SMOKEJSON exposes binary_provenance artifact and fixture path alignment for managed audit boundary checks

node_consumption.node_may_read_when: mini-kv is already running and user enabled a safe real-read window
node_consumption.node_must_verify: binary_provenance.provenance_digest equals fnv1a64:c1c0896fc6b77fe2, binary_provenance.artifact_path_hint equals c/83/, binary_provenance.release_manifest_path equals fixtures/release/verification-manifest.json, binary_provenance.runtime_smoke_evidence_path equals fixtures/release/runtime-smoke-evidence.json, binary_provenance.load_restore_compact_executed is false, binary_provenance.production_binary_claimed is false, live_read_session.session_id_echo equals mini-kv-live-read-v83, live_read_session.read_command_list_digest equals fnv1a64:5bef33f2fbe65cc5, live_read_session.write_commands_allowed is false, failure_taxonomy.taxonomy_digest equals fnv1a64:f92fcba55feb26a2, operator_window.identity_neutral_proof is true, ci_evidence.artifact_path_hint equals c/80/, artifact_retention.artifact_root equals c/, artifact_retention.artifact_path_hint equals c/81/, artifact_retention.retention_days equals 30, artifact_retention.github_artifact_upload_attempted is false, and artifact_retention.production_window_allowed is false before managed audit persistence boundary work
node_consumption.node_must_not: auto-start mini-kv without explicit operator plan, execute LOAD/COMPACT/SETNXEX/restore, claim production binary provenance, upload CI artifacts, open a production window, infer operator identity from mini-kv, or treat mini-kv as Java order authority

boundaries: no operator identity accepted or persisted
does not run Java or Node
not connected to Java transaction chain
mini-kv remains not Java order authority
failure taxonomy only; does not perform adapter retry logic

SMOKEJSON aggregates runtime evidence but does not replace Java approval or ledger state
Live-read session hint is read-only evidence, not permission to auto-start mini-kv
Node v205 must verify live_read_session, taxonomy_digest, operator_window.identity_neutral_proof, ci_evidence, and artifact_retention before the real-read execution packet
Artifact retention evidence is a read-only rehearsal hint, not real GitHub artifact retention configuration
CI evidence hint is a path and boundary hint, not a real GitHub artifact upload
Operator-window proof is identity-neutral evidence, not authentication or production authorization
Failure taxonomy digest is evidence fingerprinting, not authentication or production authorization
Binary provenance hint aligns runtime binary and fixture paths, but does not claim production binary attestation

verification_sample.node_action: verify digest before importing manual window results

categories.meaning: the read adapter window is disabled before mini-kv TCP is touched
mini-kv is not listening or not reachable in the manual window

one of SMOKEJSON, INFOJSON, STORAGEJSON, HEALTH, or STATSJSON returned an error
adapter attempted LOAD, COMPACT, SETNXEX, RESTORE, or another forbidden command
